artifacts.title: Knowledge Definition
artifacts.summary: Engineering knowledge is actionable understanding that enables effective practice within constraints.

artifacts.title: Evidence Definition
artifacts.summary: Evidence is observable, verifiable information used to support or refute claims.

artifacts.title: Ambiguity Definition
artifacts.summary: Ambiguity exists when language or concepts permit multiple valid interpretations.

artifacts.title: Hybrid Investigation-Experiment Model
artifacts.summary: Architecture C combines investigation and experiment modes for optimal knowledge discovery.

artifacts.title: Single Ownership Rule
artifacts.summary: Each artifact shall have exactly one owner responsible for its lifecycle.

artifacts.title: Artifact Lifecycle
artifacts.summary: Artifacts move through defined states: draft, review, approved, archived.

artifacts.title: Scientific Workflow
artifacts.summary: KDE applies the scientific method to knowledge discovery.

artifacts.title: Traceability Model
artifacts.summary: Bidirectional links enable complete traceability between artifacts.

artifacts.title: Metadata Standard
artifacts.summary: All artifacts require mandatory metadata fields for identification and tracking.

artifacts.title: Timestamp Standard
artifacts.summary: All timestamps shall use ISO-8601 format with second precision.

artifacts.title: Knowledge Promotion Rules
artifacts.summary: Evidence is promoted to knowledge through a defined governance process.

artifacts.title: SCADA Architecture Patterns
artifacts.summary: 13 architectural patterns for real-time SCADA platforms.

artifacts.title: SCADA Design Tradeoffs
artifacts.summary: 8 design tradeoffs analyzed for SCADA platform architecture.
